## Change Request

> **Remove this entire section if this PR does not represent a tracked change.**
>
> Filling in the block below will automatically create a change in the Support Platform
> and post a comment on this PR with a link to it.

```change-request
# Required: Short title for the change (4–60 characters)
title: ""

# Optional: Longer description (3–1000 characters)
# description: ""

# Owner of this change (the responsible ROT user). Three options — use one:
#   owner_upn: "john.doe@intility.com"            ← recommended
#   owner_guid: "xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx"  ← if you know the GUID
#   (omit both)                                   ← defaults to the PR author
owner_upn: "john.doe@intility.com"

# Required: When the change window starts (ISO 8601 UTC)
started_on: "2026-01-01T08:00:00Z"

# Required: When the change window ends (ISO 8601 UTC)
ended_on: "2026-01-01T10:00:00Z"

# Required: Set to true if ALL companies are impacted, false for specific companies only
impacts_all: false

# Optional: Whether this is an internal change. Defaults to true if omitted.
# is_internal: true

# Optional: Link existing support tickets to this change
# tickets:
#   reference_numbers:
#     - 12345
#     - 67890

# Optional: Products affected by this change (CMDB GUIDs).
# assets:
#   - "14ea6945-a8ec-4cd9-8ae8-a3d8c0778a2c"  # Intility Developer Platform
#   - "3f7b1c22-dead-beef-cafe-000000000001"  # OpenShift

# Optional: Attach relevant hyperlinks (runbooks, docs, etc.)
# hyperlinks:
#   - name: "Runbook"
#     url: "https://wiki.example.com/runbook"
#   - name: "Related incident"
#     url: "https://example.com/incident/42"
```
